mapper.select:
SELECT ew.id, ew.users_id, ew.exam_paper_id, ew.exam_question_id, ew.exam_record_id, ew.mastery_status, ep.exam_paper_name, ei.exam_name, ei.id AS exam_info_id, eq.exam_question_name, eq.exam_question_answer, eq.exam_question_analysis, eq.exam_question_types, eq.exam_question_options, ew.exam_details_myanswer, ed.exam_details_myscore, ew.insert_time, u.nickname, ei.show_answer_after_submit, er.status AS exam_record_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_wrong_question ew2 WHERE ew2.users_id = ew.users_id AND ew2.exam_question_id = ew.exam_question_id) AS wrong_count FROM exam_wrong_question ew LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON ew.exam_paper_id = ep.id LEFT JOIN users u ON ew.users_id = u.id LEFT JOIN exam_question eq ON ew.exam_question_id = eq.id LEFT JOIN exam_record er ON ew.exam_record_id = er.id LEFT JOIN exam_info ei ON er.exam_info_id = ei.id LEFT JOIN exam_details ed ON ed.exam_record_id = ew.exam_record_id AND ew.exam_question_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ew.exam_question_id) != '' AND ed.exam_question_id = CAST(TRIM(ew.exam_question_id) AS UNSIGNED)
AND ew.users_id = #{req.usersId}
AND ep.exam_paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.examPaperName}, '%')
AND eq.exam_question_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.examQuestionName}, '%')
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.nickname}, '%')
AND ew.mastery_status = #{req.masteryStatus}
ORDER BY ew.insert_time DESC

SELECT ew.id, ew.mastery_status, ep.exam_paper_myscore, eq.exam_question_name, eq.exam_question_options, eq.exam_question_analysis, eq.exam_question_sequence, ew.exam_details_myanswer, eq.exam_question_types, ep.exam_paper_name, ei.exam_name, ei.id AS exam_info_id, eq.exam_question_answer, ew.users_id, ew.exam_paper_id, ew.exam_question_id, ew.exam_record_id, ei.show_answer_after_submit, er.status AS exam_record_status, ed.exam_details_myscore, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_wrong_question ew2 WHERE ew2.users_id = ew.users_id AND ew2.exam_question_id = ew.exam_question_id) AS wrong_count FROM exam_wrong_question ew LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON ew.exam_paper_id = ep.id LEFT JOIN exam_question eq ON ew.exam_question_id = eq.id LEFT JOIN exam_record er ON ew.exam_record_id = er.id LEFT JOIN exam_info ei ON er.exam_info_id = ei.id LEFT JOIN exam_details ed ON ed.exam_record_id = ew.exam_record_id AND ew.exam_question_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ew.exam_question_id) != '' AND ed.exam_question_id = CAST(TRIM(ew.exam_question_id) AS UNSIGNED) where ew.id = #{id}

SELECT ew.id, ew.users_id, ew.exam_paper_id, ew.exam_question_id, ew.exam_record_id, ew.mastery_status, ew.exam_details_myanswer, ew.insert_time, ep.exam_paper_name, ei.exam_name, ei.id AS exam_info_id, ed.exam_details_myscore FROM exam_wrong_question ew LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON ew.exam_paper_id = ep.id LEFT JOIN exam_record er ON ew.exam_record_id = er.id LEFT JOIN exam_info ei ON er.exam_info_id = ei.id LEFT JOIN exam_details ed ON ed.exam_record_id = ew.exam_record_id AND ew.exam_question_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ew.exam_question_id) != '' AND ed.exam_question_id = CAST(TRIM(ew.exam_question_id) AS UNSIGNED) WHERE ew.users_id = #{usersId} AND ew.exam_question_id = #{examQuestionId} ORDER BY ew.insert_time DESC
